script_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern STRIKE_RADAR_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 5 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 5 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

antenna_pattern RED_RADAR_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 35 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 2 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 5 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type AGM88_MISSILE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_STRAIGHT_LINE_MOVER
      maximum_speed 600 m/sec
      minimum_speed 200 m/sec
   end_mover
   processor fuse WSF_GROUND_TARGET_FUSE
   end_processor
   processor seeker WSF_PERFECT_TRACKER
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type SAM_MISSILE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_STRAIGHT_LINE_MOVER
      maximum_speed 800 m/sec
      minimum_speed 100 m/sec
   end_mover
   processor fuse WSF_AIR_TARGET_FUSE
   end_processor
   processor seeker WSF_PERFECT_TRACKER
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type BLUE_STRIKE_AIRCRAFT WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 300 m/sec
      minimum_speed 100 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 1 sec
      maximum_range 60 nm
      minimum_range 0.5 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern STRIKE_RADAR_ANT
         power 20 kw
         pulse_width 1e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 2000 hz
         frequency 10000 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern STRIKE_RADAR_ANT
         bandwidth 10 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor agm_launch WSF_ATG_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
   end_processor
   processor strike_task WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
      advanced_behavior_tree
         parallel
            behavior_node choose_tree
               node engage
                  target_criteria side red type ground
                  launch_weapon agm88
               end_node
            end_behavior_node
         end_parallel
      end_advanced_behavior_tree
   end_processor
   weapon agm88 WSF_EXPLICIT_WEAPON
      weapon_effects
         casualty_range 20 m
      end_weapon_effects
      spawned_platform_type AGM88_MISSILE
      quantity 2
      firing_delay 1 sec
      salvo_interval 0.5 sec
      launcher launcher_1
      end_launcher
   end_weapon
end_platform_type

platform_type IADS_COMMAND_PLATFORM WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   processor battle_manager WSF_UNCLASS_BM
      weapon_table
         weapon sam_weapon
      end_weapon_table
      scoring_factors
         enemy_aircraft 1.0
      end_scoring_factors
      engage_iff_permissions
         blue engage
      end_engage_iff_permissions
   end_processor
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network iads_net
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type GROUND_RADAR_SITE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor acq_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      maximum_range 100 nm
      minimum_range 0 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern RED_RADAR_ANT
         power 100 kw
         pulse_width 5e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 300 hz
         frequency 3000 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern RED_RADAR_ANT
         bandwidth 5 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   sensor track_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 0.5 sec
      maximum_range 50 nm
      minimum_range 0.5 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern RED_RADAR_ANT
         power 50 kw
         pulse_width 2e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 1000 hz
         frequency 9000 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern RED_RADAR_ANT
         bandwidth 10 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor track_processor WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   processor sensor_manager WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network iads_net
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type SAM_SITE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   weapon sam_weapon WSF_EXPLICIT_WEAPON
      weapon_effects
         casualty_range 50 m
      end_weapon_effects
      spawned_platform_type SAM_MISSILE
      quantity 4
      firing_delay 2 sec
      salvo_interval 1 sec
      launcher launcher_1
      end_launcher
   end_weapon
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network iads_net
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform blue_strike_1 BLUE_STRIKE_AIRCRAFT
   side blue
   route
      position 30.50n 103.90e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.78n 104.20e altitude 5000 m msl speed 250 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar on
end_platform

platform blue_strike_2 BLUE_STRIKE_AIRCRAFT
   side blue
   route
      position 30.50n 103.90e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.78n 104.20e altitude 5000 m msl speed 250 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar on
end_platform

platform red_iads_commander IADS_COMMAND_PLATFORM
   side red
   route
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   comm datalink on
end_platform

platform red_radar_company GROUND_RADAR_SITE
   side red
   route
      position 30.84n 104.29e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor acq_radar on
   sensor track_radar on
   comm datalink on
end_platform

platform red_sam_battery SAM_SITE
   side red
   route
      position 30.86n 104.31e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   comm datalink on
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/iads_strike.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   file output/iads_strike.evt
end_event_output

end_time 600 sec
